description: bids-validator-deno checks whether a directory is compatible with the Brain Imaging Data Structure (BIDS) specification and reports validation issues in text or JSON format.

inputs.name: Dataset directory
inputs.description: Path to the BIDS dataset directory to validate.

inputs.name: JSON output (deprecated)
inputs.description: [Deprecated] Use --format json instead. Output machine readable JSON. When present, overrides --format and forces JSON output.

inputs.name: Output format
inputs.description: Output format: text (default), json, or json_pp (pretty-printed JSON).

inputs.name: Schema version
inputs.description: Specify a schema version to use for validation. Accepts an arbitrary URL or a tag such as vX.Y.Z, stable, or latest. The BIDS_SCHEMA environment variable overrides this option.

inputs.name: Configuration file
inputs.description: Path to a JSON configuration file. The file must contain a JSON object mapping severity keys (error, warning, ignore) to arrays of issue filters.

inputs.name: Maximum TSV rows
inputs.description: Maximum number of rows to validate in TSVs (tool default: 1000).

inputs.name: Verbose logging
inputs.description: Log more extensive information about issues.

inputs.name: Debug logging level
inputs.description: Enable debug logging (tool default: ERROR; allowed values: NOTSET, DEBUG, INFO, WARNING, ERROR, CRITICAL).

inputs.name: Filename-only mode
inputs.description: Disable schema-based filename validation and only check whether files are valid BIDS filenames.

inputs.name: Permitted dataset types
inputs.description: Permitted dataset types to validate against (tool default: empty list, which permits all types).

inputs.name: Blacklisted modalities
inputs.description: Modalities to exclude from validation (tool default: empty list). Unknown values produce a warning and are ignored; supplied values are lower-cased before lookup.

inputs.name: Prune sourcedata, derivatives, and code
inputs.description: Skip the sourcedata, derivatives, and code directories. Disables recursive derivative validation.

inputs.name: Output file
inputs.description: Write the validation results to a file. Only writes a file when running under Deno; otherwise output goes to stdout.

inputs.name: Preferred remote source
inputs.description: Prefer a remote file source over local files.

inputs.name: Color output
inputs.description: Enable/disable color output (defaults to detected support).

output-files.name: Validation report file
output-files.description: Validation results written to the path supplied by --outfile when running under Deno.

stdout-output.name: Validation report (stdout)
stdout-output.description: Formatted validation report printed to stdout when --outfile is not provided or the Deno runtime is unavailable.

name: bids-validator-deno
